posts.text:
They are going to lie about Joe Kent and try to discredit him. Do not believe the lies! Joe Kent is a great American hero deployed 11 times and a Gold Star Husband! 
He’s right!


Former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene🇺🇸 (@FmrRepMTG)

Joe Kent is a GREAT AMERICAN HERO.
God bless him and protect him!



— https://nitter.net/FmrRepMTG/status/2033914076741382642#m

I wholeheartedly support Megyn Kelly telling the world that Mark Levin has a micropenis.
It’s the most deserved insult and I don’t care if it’s vulgar.
And Trump’s gigantic defense of Levin only enraged the base more.
People are DONE.
MAGA destroyed by micropenis Mark Levin.


Megyn Kelly (@megynkelly)

Disagree. You can take the high road and ignore for a while but eventually after hundreds of tweets/attacks you punch the bully in the rhetorical face. And then he goes running to daddy about his

This is so disturbing, but a real glimpse into how your Congressmen are bought off.
Thomas Massie’s Trump endorsed opponent is funded like a foreign agent. 
Please donate to Thomas Massie!!


Thomas Massie for Congress (@MassieforKY)

Wow, based on 95% of his financial support, Ed might as well change his citizenship. 🇮🇱

We only have 66 days left in this race and I’m being outspent 2 to 1 by foreign interests.

If you’re America First, please support me here. secure.thomasmassie.com/dona…

It’s time to reorganize. 
It’s already beginning. 
The mission, not the man.


MILO (@Nero)

I was there when the President came down the golden elevator. I campaigned for him for years. But I am faithful to the mission, not the man. Trump has lost his way, bought off by foreign interests. Those of us who made him what he is have a duty now to unmake him. And we will.



— https://nitter.net/Nero/status/2033222824983449891#m

I agree 100%
OG MAGA must stop foreign interference in our government and fight it.


Suzzanne Monk 🇺🇲 (@Trumpertarian)

I will be leaving the MAGA mission and launching a new mission to end foreign interference in our government. 

We will never be able to MAGA as long as foreign lobbyists can buy presidents.



— https://nitter.net/Trumpertarian/status/2033150207345537091#m
Christ is King!!! 👑 ✝️

💯
nitter.net/matth_4america/status/…


Matthew H (@MattH_4America)

Thomas Massie is what Donald Trump pretended to be



— https://nitter.net/MattH_4America/status/2032897157448216712#m

I’ve been on the phone with some of the top America First Conservative leaders.

We are all in agreement.

The admin and Republican Party is going in the wrong direction on key issues, like the war, Epstein, and especially domestic issues, and has been completely hijacked by the Lindsey Grahams, Mark Levin, and the neocon establishment Republicans we all voted against.

The future of America belongs to us, the younger generations, not the boomers in charge and their boomer donors. 

I, and other

Huh?
And it’s only Tuesday.


matrixbot (@thematrixb0t)

Transgender Laverne Cox guest on MSNBC 
"We need to stop antisemitism in order to protect transgenders because Jews invented transgenderism"

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/thematrixb0t/status/2031392184797175822#m

This is incredibly sad. 🙏


sarah (@sahouraxo)

“None of us carries any weapons.”

“We carry nothing but kindness, goodness, love and prayer.”

These were the words of Father Pierre El Rahi.

Today, Israel killed him in South Lebanon.

A priest with prayers. Murdered in broad daylight.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/sahouraxo/status/2031066762859389213#m

They tried to add women to the draft to selective service multiple times while I was in Congress.
Trump and Republicans need to guarantee that there will be NO DRAFT AND NEVER DRAFT OUR DAUGHTERS.

By the way a bunch of psycho Republicans want to not only draft your sons but your daughters too!!!!!

Send Lindsey Graham, Mark Levin, and Laura Loomer and ALL the murderous blood thirsty maniacs that support this America LAST WAR.


Former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene🇺🇸 (@FmrRepMTG)

Karoline Leavitt doesn’t rule out a draft.

How about the answer is NO DRAFT AND NO BOOTS ON THE GROUND because we campaigned on NO MORE FOREIGN WARS OR REGIME CHANGE!!!

Liars every single one of them!

N

I’m done. Absolutely done.
The war is bad enough but giving into Democrats on transing children is enough to lose me forever.
If the GOP supports transing minors with sick mentally ill parent’s consent, I’m registering as an independent. 
My only policies are Jesus.


Former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene🇺🇸 (@FmrRepMTG)

#5???!!!!
“Without the express written approval of the parents”
Trump now supports trans gender mutilation surgeries of children if their parents want it!!!!!
The House pa

Incredible podcast by Tucker Carlson. 
Telling the truth is no threat to anyone. 
The greater threat is war for heretical lies.


Tucker Carlson (@TuckerCarlson)

Could this be a religious war designed to rebuild the Third Temple on the ashes of Al Aqsa? Hope not.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TuckerCarlson/status/2029379008496853049#m

Listen to every second of this video.

I’m proud to call Thomas Massie my friend.


Thomas Massie (@RepThomasMassie)

We’re debating the Iran War Powers Resolution I co-authored with @RepRoKhanna.

Under our Constitution, the power to initiate war rests solely with Congress.

Congress owes our service members a clearly defined mission, so that when they accomplish it, they can come home.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/RepThomasMassie/status/2029321430492393707#m
